About

Learn more about me.

My Story

Hello, my name is Lahcen Idir. I'm from Morocco and I'm 23 years old. I'm a web developer specializing in PHP Laravel. Currently, I'm working as an intern for Mandi Tech Info, a company based in Morocco, where I've been for 8 months. Before my time there, I've worked on various web projects such as hospital management systems, invoicing platforms, and online recruitment portals.

What I Do

I am currently focusing on learning front-end frameworks such as React and Next.js, alongside honing my backend skills, with a particular emphasis on mastering user-friendly technologies like Node.js and Express.js.

My Goals

My goal now is to master Front-End and Back-End technology. So that I can build a solution to an existing problem easily.

My Dreams

I aspire to join prestigious companies such as Google or Microsoft, targeting roles in software development engineering or front-end development.
